holdings.infoBox: DVGR is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are Oracle stock at 5.47%, Microsoft at 4.75%, Broadcom at 4.60%, The Goldman Sachs Group at 4.58%, and KLA Corporation at 4.37%.

overview.description: The DAC 3D Dividend Growth ETF (DVGR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF the selects US-listed stocks of companies globally that have significantly increased their dividends for at least 10 years. Companies selected may be of any market capitalization and holdings are weighted based on fundamental criteria DVGR was launched on Dec 5, 2025 and is issued by DAC.
